statement: FK helper generation and cleanup contracts should be reviewable as transformation-centric registry rows.
user_visible_effect: Reviewers can see which transformations produce helper columns and which cleanup step removes them.
notes: Seed row only; not full coverage.

statement: Cell codec behavior should be traceable as a transformation contract without changing runtime semantics.
user_visible_effect: Reviewers can distinguish codec projection rules from spreadsheet IO mechanics.
